summary: Comprehensive testing of Physical Stock Upload Preview bug fixes. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification passed - Login works, Dashboard loads, Physical vs Book page loads with date selector and comparison features, Current Stock page shows inventory with group member breakdowns.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Upload-preview resolver builds comprehensive name_to_base_key lookup (server.py lines 2434-2464)
✓ Group members (SNT-40 PREMIUM) correctly resolve to leader (SNT 40-256)
✓ Base values in upload-preview match Current Stock page values
✓ Compare endpoint includes gross_difference and gross_difference_kg fields (server.py lines 2924-2925)
✓ Compare endpoint uses gross difference for classification when net is negligible (server.py line 2930)
✓ Physical stock dates returned in descending order
✓ Apply-updates expects 'items' array with full item data (not 'updates')
seed_data_creation: Test files created dynamically with openpyxl for upload-preview testing. Used existing data for date 2026-03-31.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Physical Stock Upload Preview bug fixes fully verified. Key endpoints: POST /api/physical-stock/upload-preview (group member resolution verified), GET /api/inventory/current (returns inventory with group member breakdowns), GET /api/physical-stock/compare (includes gross_difference fields), POST /api/physical-stock/apply-updates (expects 'items' array). Test database has groups: SNT 40-256 (members: SNT-40 PREMIUM, SNT 40-256), TULSI 70 -264 (members: TULSI 70 -264, TULSI 70 BELT).

group_member_resolution.description: Uploading group member (SNT-40 PREMIUM) correctly resolves to leader (SNT 40-256) in preview

base_matches_current_stock.description: Upload-preview base values (old_gr_wt, old_net_wt) match GET /api/inventory/current

compare_gross_difference.description: Compare endpoint includes gross_difference, gross_difference_kg, book_gross_wt, physical_gross_wt

compare_requires_date.description: Compare endpoint returns 422 without verification_date parameter

current_inventory.description: Returns all items with proper structure including is_group flag and members array

apply_updates.description: Apply updates endpoint works correctly with 'items' array

dates_sorted.description: Physical stock dates returned in descending order

playwright_test_results.dashboard_load: PASS - Shows 11,767 transactions, Stock Reconciliation History
playwright_test_results.physical_vs_book: PASS - Page loads with date selector (data-testid='compare-date-filter'), summary cards (Book Stock, Physical Stock, Difference, Accuracy)
playwright_test_results.current_stock: PASS - Shows 78 items, SNT 40-256 group with expandable members
